title: Azure Event Hubs Event Data
description: Represents the data model for events sent to and received from Azure Event Hubs. An event consists of a body (the payload), application-defined properties (metadata), and system properties assigned by the Event Hubs service when the event is enqueued.

body.description: The body of the event. Can be any serialized data including JSON objects, strings, binary data, or Avro-encoded records. The content type should be set in the system properties.

properties.description: Application-defined properties associated with the event. These are custom key-value pairs that serve as event metadata and can be used for filtering and routing.

systemProperties.description: System properties assigned by the Event Hubs service when the event is accepted and enqueued.

x-opt-sequence-number.description: The logical sequence number of the event within the partition stream. This is a unique, monotonically increasing number assigned by Event Hubs.

x-opt-offset.description: The offset of the event within the partition log. This string value represents the byte position and can be used as a cursor for reading.

x-opt-enqueued-time.description: The UTC time when the event was accepted and stored in the partition.

x-opt-partition-key.description: The partition key used to determine which partition the event was sent to. Events with the same partition key are guaranteed to arrive at the same partition.

x-opt-publisher.description: The publisher name if the event was sent using a publisher endpoint.

message-id.description: An application-defined identifier for the message, used for deduplication.

correlation-id.description: A correlation identifier for relating events across different systems.

content-type.description: The RFC 2046 content type of the event body (e.g., application/json, application/octet-stream).

content-encoding.description: The content encoding of the event body (e.g., gzip, deflate).

BatchEventMessage.description: A single message within a batch of events sent to Event Hubs via the REST API.

Body.description: The body content of the event message.

UserProperties.description: Custom user properties for this specific event in the batch.

PartitionKey.description: The partition key used to determine the target partition.

MessageId.description: The unique identifier of the message.

BatchEventPayload.description: An array of event messages for batch sending via the Event Hubs REST API. The Content-Type must be set to application/vnd.microsoft.servicebus.json.
